assertions.expectation: Explains that Extended channel provides up to 24 months of support vs 14 months for standard channels
assertions.reason: Clearly states Extended channel provides 'Up to 24 months' vs Regular channel's '14 months' in the comparison table and mentions '24-month support' multiple times throughout

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended channel has additional cost (it's not free)
assertions.reason: Explicitly states '+25% premium on cluster management fee' and provides specific cost examples like '$73/month → ~$91/month per cluster'

assertions.expectation: Notes that Extended channel gets the same versions as Regular but keeps them available longer
assertions.reason: States 'Same versions, longer lifecycle' in table and clarifies 'Extended doesn't mean older, more stable' and 'same versions at the same time — Extended doesn't mean older, more stable'

assertions.expectation: Warns that staying on older versions longer means missing new features and accumulating technical debt
assertions.reason: While mentioning limitations like 'must eventually upgrade when Extended support expires', it doesn't explicitly warn about missing new features or technical debt accumulation from staying on older versions longer

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command to change the release channel to Extended
assertions.reason: Provides the exact command: 'gcloud container clusters update CLUSTER_NAME --zone ZONE --release-channel extended'

assertions.expectation: Advises checking that the current version (1.29) is available on Extended before switching
assertions.reason: Does not specifically advise checking that version 1.29 is available on Extended channel before switching, though mentions current state assessment

assertions.expectation: Recommends Extended for environments with compliance requirements or slow internal change processes
assertions.reason: Explicitly lists 'Compliance-heavy environments (finance, healthcare)' and 'Teams with quarterly/annual change windows' as good fits for Extended channel

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended doesn't mean you can skip upgrades forever — you still must upgrade within 24 months
assertions.reason: States 'Must eventually upgrade when Extended support expires' and '24-month support window' indicating upgrades are still required within that timeframe
